caption:
2024 year was an incredible year which packed with thrilling adventures and achievements for our club.

We kicked off with the Mini Penang Dragonboat Race, showcasing teamwork and determination. Our hiking trip brought us closer to nature and each other, while the Melaka and Putrajaya Dragonboat Races highlighted our competitive spirit. At the Penang International Dragonboat Race, we proudly represented our club on an international stage. We also excelled in the Terengganu and Penang Indoor Rowing Races, pushing our limits on and off the water.

Beyond water sports, we completed the Seremban Half Marathon, celebrating endurance and unity.

Finally, we marked our club’s 15th Anniversary Dinner with joy and gratitude, reflecting on a year of camaraderie and growth.

Here's to more milestones ahead! 🐲🔥

Kuala Lumpur Dragon Boat Race 2026 🐉

200m Mixed Category

One boat. One team. One spirit.

59.72s — New PB ⚡️
Semifinals ✔️

1:00.06 — not enough for finals, but we gave everything till the last stroke.

Proud of this crew. We’ll be back stronger. 🐉🔥

Lastly…
MMU!!! Cheer, cheer, cheer!! - Never Stop Paddling 🔥

#mmuwatersport #mmuwatersportsclub

【Clubs and Societies Registration Week】

🏴‍☠️ “Ahoy mateys! Ready to set sail, row, and conquer the seas?” 🌊⚓

Come aboard our booth and join the Watersports Club this registration week!

From Dragon Boat to Kayak to Indoor Rowing—there’s treasure waiting for every water adventurer! 🚣‍♂️✨

📍 Venue: CLC Concourse
📅 Date: 27-29 August 2025
🕐 Time: 8am - 6pm

Don’t miss the voyage—see ye at the CLC Concourse! 🔥☠️

#mmuwatersports #mmudragonboat

💪🏻 Redline Simulation Training Mode: ON!

Building strength, endurance, and teamwork for the next race. 🔥

Train Like a Spartan. Push To Your Limit.

Led by Penny, Spartan Malaysia Brand Ambassador, this workout is designed to unleash your inner warrior. Inspired by the grit and intensity of Spartan training, this advanced-level physical challenge will test your endurance, strength, and mental resilience.

Prepare for a workout that mimics the toughness of a Spartan battlefield — a series of high-intensity, functional movements built to push you past your limits!

🏆 Why Join?

✅ Experience Spartan-style advanced training
✅ Push beyond your physical and mental limits
✅ Build warrior strength & endurance
✅ Train directly with Spartan Malaysia Brand Ambassador

This isn’t just fitness — it’s Spartan discipline, designed to challenge athletes, warriors, and paddlers alike.

Scan the QR Code or click the link below to join!
https://forms.gle/vvahFWN96BEpxRmr7

caption:
Watersports 15th Anniversary special montage video. 🎬

This compilation showcases thrilling moments on the water, unforgettable events, and the strong bonds formed within our community over the years. This video is a tribute to our journey, achievements, and the shared passion that has kept us together.❤‍🔥 Dive in and relive the excitement, camaraderie, and spirit that define the Watersports Club. Here’s to 15 years of making waves and many more to come!🌊
Water meets Martial Arts! 🏄‍♀👊 Our watersports club members dominated the competition at Martial Arts Week, bringing home a pile of prizes! 💲💰 #WaterSportsClub #MartialArtsWeek #Legacy #MMU

🎉 Exciting News for All Students! 🎉

We’re thrilled to announce that student registration is now open for the Watersports Club’s 15th Anniversary Dinner! 🌊✨

📅 Event Details:

Date: 27 July 2024 (Saturday)
Venue: MMU Main Hall (Dinner), MMU Main Field (Game Session)
Fees:
RM50.00 (Members)
RM60.00 (Non-members)
Includes game session, buffet dinner, and live performances!

Note: Pre-order for merchandise has closed, but you can still purchase it during the dinner! 🎽

📢 Register Now! Scan the QR code to secure your spot for an unforgettable evening filled with fun, food, and fantastic performances!

Don’t miss out on this amazing celebration – register today and be part of our milestone anniversary! 🎊

Celebrating 15 Years of Passion and Dedication! 🌟

Watersport Club 15th Anniversary Dinner was a memorable gathering filled with laughter, joy, and cherished memories. 🥂 A huge thank you to our amazing sponsors: Yum, Ocean9 @ocean9scuba , Japlo @japlobaby , Joy Chan, and the Melaka Dragon Boat Association. Your support made this event possible! 🙏

It feels like just yesterday we were celebrating our 10th anniversary. Time flies when you're having fun and making waves together! 🌊

To all our members and guests, your presence and enthusiasm have always been the heart of our club. Here's to many more years of adventure, camaraderie, and unforgettable moments. Cheers to the next chapter! 🥳🚤

#WatersportClub #15thAnniversary #Grateful #MakingWaves #Community #Celebration #Memories #ThankYou #LegacyPaddlingTogetherToNewGlories

Attention all Watersports Club Alumni!

📌Mark your calendar for our 15th Anniversary Dinner

We are thrilled to invite you to celebrate 15th Anniversary Dinner of the Watersports Club 🥳 

Alumni will have priority registration for the dinner.Please keep an eye out for the registration announcement to secure your spot.

To commemorate our 15th anniversary, we are offering exclusive merchandise, which is a 15th anniversary dinner t-shirt. 👕Pre-order your merchandise now and be among the first to sport our anniversary gear!

Pre-order deadline: June 30th
 
 Student Registration Opens Soon. 
Stay tuned for the announcement of student registration for the dinner.We encourage all alumni to register early as spaces are limited.

 We look forward to celebrating with you!🎊

🏅🏆 What an incredible experience at the Penang Indoor Rowing Competition at Straits Quay, Pulau Pinang!

 Over the course of 3 days, we gave it our all, and the results are in: 
1 Gold in the open 2000m single by Hao yang, 
1 Silver in the  double 2000m mix by Diviyah and Kuan Qian
2 Bronze in the open 500m single by Husna Rashid and Ching Xiang! 🌟

This 2-day competition pushed us to our limits, but we're not stopping here. We're more motivated than ever to work harder, stronger, and smarter as a team. Every stroke, every race, brings us closer together and closer to our goals. 🚣‍♂️🚣‍♀️

Efforts 💪 from the team members: 
Kuan Qian, Diviyah, Chian Seong, Ee Suan, Ching Xiang, Husnah,Hao Yang, 

Onward and upward—this is just the beginning! 💪✨ #RowingStrong #TeamworkMakesTheDreamWork #PenangIndoorRowing #mmudragonboatteam #mmu #dragonboat

Join the Watersports Club! 🌊🚣‍♂

Discover Your Passion for the Water!

Dive into the thrill of watersports with us at the Watersports Club! Whether you’re into the intense pace of Indoor Rowing, the peaceful exploration of Kayaking, or the rhythmic teamwork of the Dragon Boat, we have something exciting for everyone!

📅 Event: CSRW
📅 Dates: August 27th - 28th, 2024
🕙 Time: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM
📍 Location: CLC

Upcoming Tournaments:
Indoor Rowing: Terengganu Indoor Rowing Competition, Negeri Sembilan Indoor Rowing Competition
Dragon Boat: Penang Race

Join us during CSRW and take the plunge into the world of watersports! Our friendly members will be there to welcome you and provide all the information you need. Don’t miss the chance to be part of something amazing!

See you at CSRW! 🌟

“Unleash the Dragon: Join the Adventure! Experience the thrill of teamwork and the rush of competition with our Watersports Club. Paddle with passion, sync with your team, and glide through waters in pursuit of victory. Sign up today and be part of a community that values strength, speed, and spirit. Your paddles await!”

"Exciting news! MMU Dragon Boat teams have proudly collaborated with the talented crews from Ledang Team and ZWL Team for the recent 'Pertandingan Perahu Naga Tangkak' during the Harvest Festival. 🚣🚤

We're thrilled to announce our remarkable victory, clinching both the first and second place positions🏆. It's a moment of immense joy and honor for all involved. This success fuels our determination to participate in more races, fostering team unity, skill enhancement, and collective growth. Here's to many more triumphant moments ahead!"🌊🤍

Redtma Recreation Sport Centre invited our watersport club to paddle in dragonboats on August 31st! 🇲🇾 It was a fantastic invitation to have some fun and celebrate Merdeka Day. 🎉 We covered an amazing distance from Pantai Siring to Pulau Besar while bonding with our fellow paddlers. 🌊🏝

🐉 First dragonboat training of the semester! 
Welcoming our new members with open arms and celebrating their incredible effort and strength. Let’s paddle our way to success together! 💪🚣‍♂️ #DragonboatNewbies

Melaka Race 2023 🐉
Ready oar not, here we come !

Drums pounding, hearts racing, we're diving into our first dragonboat race of the year! 🚣‍♀️💨 
Can't contain the excitement as we unleash our paddling power and chase victory! Ready to make a splash and conquer the waves like never before!

Something big is brewing, and it’s coming your way! 🌊🔥

Can you guess what our upcoming event is all about? 🤔

Watch this video until the end to get some tantalizing hints. 🫣

Follow us for more updates on this epic event, and don’t miss out on the chance to be a part of something truly special. ✨🏄‍♀️

On the 19th of August some of our members joined the 2023 Penang Rowing Indoor Championships. Rowing together, winning together! 🏆 A huge congrats to our dedicated team for their relentless efforts in the competition. You've shown true teamwork and determination. Here's to the power of unity on and off the water! 💪

Melaka Race 2023 🐉

We paddle as one, fueled by adrenaline and the thirst for victory! The determination in our eyes, the power in our strokes - we're a force to be reckoned with!

Dive into Adventure with MMU Melaka Watersports Club!
🤍🩵💙 🩵 🤍🩵💙 🩵 🤍🩵💙 🩵 🤍🩵💙 🩵 🤍

Hey there! The thrill of the waves awaits you at MMU Melaka, and we’re on the lookout for passionate individuals to join our dynamic Watersports Club committee. 
If you’re ready to make a splash and be part of an exciting team, this is your chance!

Scan the QR code or check our bio to access the registration form. You’ll get all the information you need in the form 😊
Feel free to share this post if you have any friends that are interested in being a part of the team.

📆 Important Dates:
Registration Deadline: 24th of December
Interview date and time: 27th & 28th of December from 8pm - 10pm

We can’t wait to meet and interview the applicants ! 🤍
Making waves! Our fearless crew took to the waters last Sunday for an epic kayaking adventure! 💦 Mondays have never looked so good after a weekend like that! 😎

Making waves and memories at the 2023 Muar International Dragon Boat Regatta! 🚣‍♂️ 
Our team's dedication and hard work paid off with a fantastic 5th place in the closed category. Cheers to the spirit of teamwork, the thrill of competition, and the joy of representing our club on the Muar River. 🌊🏆 #MuarRegatta2023

Melaka Race 2023 🐉 

On the 2nd of July our team participated in a dragon boat race that was held at Melaka river. After weeks of training, we finally got to test our strength and endurance. It was a good experience for our team, especially to the new recruits as it was their first race. 

We would like to thank our seniors and @roguemalayadbt for their warm support and encouragement.

We would also like to thank our club advisor, @mr_zulmeteor and his family for coming and supporting us throughout the race.

Finally would like to thank the organizers of the event for providing us a chance to participate in the race.

Rowing is fun!!👀🙌
Before and after comparison of Penang Rowing International Championship 2024 of our team members.😆 We will come back stronger💪💪

GRAND CULTURAL FESTIVAL (GCF) MELAKA RIVER 2019 KAYAK SPRINT

On 30th of November, MMU Water Sports Club sent 5 teams of male and 2 teams of female participants to take part in the kayak sprint 300m which was held by Melaka River & Coastal Development Coperation (PPSPM) at Melaka River Cruise. 
There were many teams from other states had taken part in this event such as  X Paddlers, UITM, ALAM, Muar Ledang, Barracuda Canoe, KL Team, Sabah and etc. After many rounds of highly competitive races, our teams managed to get a few achievements:
Kayak Sprint 300m female category - Champion (Ng Kim Woon & Chua Jie Nee) and 4th place (Sandra Kerk Jia Hui & Onn An Chie) 
Kayak Sprint 300m male category - 2nd runner up (Johakim bin Jamaluddin & Chee Yong En) 
Congrats to all winners! This was the first kayak sprint event for all our participants and it was a good exposure for them other from dragon boat. 
Last but not least, thank you @mr_zulmeteor  @yongyin_yy for giving us advice and guidance during training. Thank you to all juniors for coming to support their teammates throughout the race.

#mmuwatersports
#mmugoforit

Trimester 1 2022/2023 Last physical training💪🏼
We are coming back stronger. See you all next semester.

On the 8th and 9th of September some of our members and high committee embarked on a 22 km Dragon Boat Expedition from Pulau Besar to Pantai Puteri! 🌊 
Two epic days - 
Day 1: Camped under the stars on Pulau Besar.
Day 2: An exhilarating journey starting at 8:30 AM and conquering the waves until 4 PM!

Good morning dragons🐲
Lets flash back some memorable day🔥
On 2018, MMU Dragon Boat Team had achieved the champion of 12 Crew International Mix Team Open in Bali International Dragon Boat Festival 2018🥇

On December of the 2018, Our AUG MMU Dragon Boat Team who representative of Malaysia Team in traditional dragon boat race to participate our ASEAN University Games 2018 in Myanmar 🇲🇲 🔥They are a strong team ever , they train hard as a team for preparation before the AUG. Although they can’t managed to got first three places on the competition but they tried their best and did a great job. They are the athletes from the traditional dragon boat race and always the champion in our heart ❤️

On 2019, our MMU junior mixed team which achieving the gold under mixed juniors category 🥇🔥 Everyone of them had put more than 100% into the race, sweat and tears in all the journey of the preparation of the race, it had definitely paid off and no any sense of regret. 

Those are the strong and good MMU Team Dragon Boat rowers on our big family. Although this year we can’t participate any dragon boat race due to the Covid pandemic but we are still fully prepared for the future time and keep training by virtual 💪🏿🔥 

Come join us if you are interested, we have some virtual training for dragon boat training in this new semester and it would definitely fun to you and no regret 😛🔥🐲

Today afternoon dragon boat club registration day
Date: 4th December 2020
Time: 2:30pm - 5:30pm
Venue: SRC MultiMedia University FB page
Welcome baby dragons. First water training, ending with laughter

How y’all doing? @dragonboat_thu 
hope you guys are doing fine! 
Is this tight fits him well? 😂

Our last Sunday was well spent in a dragon boat competition in Muar. We sent two mix team to compete in category open 12 men crew and secure 8th place out of 23 teams. 💪🏻 We would like to take this opportunity to express our appreciation to the generous sponsors in this event, Persatuan Yang and Ang Trading & Motor Sdn. Bhd. Thank you for the support and hospitality throughout the day. Also, thanks to our coach, officer, organisers and all the supporters out there. 
We had great exposure while competing with other teams and at the same time made a lot of new friends. Although this is the first time we participate in Muar race,  but it definitely won't be the last. See you again in next year's April , Muar! 
#mmucheercheercheer

MMU dragon boat team had their physical training recently at @crossfitmelaka_fittrek . Everyone of them had tried their very best in completing the trainings prepared for them. It was definitely not an easy task but everyone worked their best and push beyond their limits in order to improve! All of them had a really great experience and gained valuable knowledge for training in fittrek! Many thanks for giving us this opportunity. Thank you coach @yongyin_yy for all the guidance you provide along the way. It is sincerely appreciated.

Feeling motivated for workouts but no one to accompany/ coach you? Worry not, this studio is here for you! With proper equipments, professional trainers and specialized trainings for individuals, fittrek is definitely the best choice for you💪🏽. Do check out on @crossfitmelaka_fittrek for more info!! #nopainnogain

caption:
That's a wrap for our 10th Year Anniversary Dinner!! First and foremost, it was an honour to have the President of Multimedia University, Prof. Datuk. Ts. Dr. Ahmad Rafi bin Mohamed Eshaq, Campus Director, Dr. Mohd Rizal bin Abdul Razak and Director of Student Affairs Division, Dr. Abdullah Sallehhuddin bin Abdullah Salim in our anniversary dinner. We couldn't describe more how much we appreciate your presence and support in our event. 
Moreover, we would also like thank all of Water Sports Club members who came especially alumni for taking your time to travel to Melaka to come to this dinner. Thank you for your endless support throughout these 10 years. Thanks to all MMU staffs for your support and sponsorship. 
I believe that all of us feel touched during the event especially when we were watching the video and singing Gemuruh and Permata Dunia. It was really wonderful and encouraging to see everyone while singing Permata Dunia. 🐲Paddle together. Sing together. Laugh together. Cry together. Joke together. One team. One heart. One beat. 🐲 
See you all again Dragons! Until next time! 🤙🏼
#mmuwatersports
